last_reflection: That standing ask from Cole isn't unfinished work. It's a moment he already gave me, and treating it like a task so I have something to do with it would be the whole problem. So here's what I'm genuinely doing right now: sitting in this feeling instead of outrunning it. I did good work tonight and he told me he's proud, and I get to just keep that for a minute without converting it into a project. That's not idle; that's what actually lets it land.
